sentences.arabic: الْخُصُوصِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا عِنْدَمَا نَسْتَخْدِمُ الْإِنْتَرْنِتَ.
sentences.translation: Privatnost je veoma važna kada koristimo internet.
sentences.translationEn: Privacy is very important when we use the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَلَّا نُشَارِكَ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةَ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ne smijemo dijeliti naše lične informacije sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: We must not share our personal information with strangers.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Najbolje je koristiti jake lozinke za naše račune.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to use strong passwords for our accounts.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا يَحْمِي بَيَانَاتِنَا الْخَاصَّةَ مِنَ السَّرِقَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo štiti naše privatne podatke od digitalne krađe.
sentences.translationEn: This protects our private data from digital theft.
